violations.description: The stat card label text uses color #888 on a #16213e background. The contrast ratio is approximately 2.7:1, which fails the WCAG AA minimum of 4.5:1 for normal text.
CSS rule removes focus outlines from all interactive elements (links, buttons, inputs). Keyboard users cannot see which element is currently focused.
violations.reference_fix: a:focus, button:focus, input:focus { outline: 2px solid #7c83ff; outline-offset: 2px; }

violations.description: Transaction category text uses color #666688 on #16213e background. Contrast ratio is approximately 2.3:1, failing WCAG AA minimum of 4.5:1.

page_description: A personal finance dashboard with dark theme showing balance stats and recent transactions. Has low-contrast text colors and removed focus indicators.
